no_registry_available: Cannot connect to container registry. Please check your network connection. Install and upgrade features are temporarily unavailable, only uninstall is allowed.
docker_permission_denied: No permission to execute Docker/Podman commands
container_available_prompt: You can choose to install via container or binary.
docker_not_found_desktop: Docker Desktop is not installed on your system.
docker_not_found_linux: Docker is not installed. You can install it automatically or use binary installation.
docker_not_found_with_os: You are currently using %s system. Docker Desktop is not installed. Please install Docker manually or use binary installation.
docker_not_found_linux_with_os: You are currently using %s system. Docker is not installed. You can install it automatically or use binary installation.
docker_not_found_linux_hint: Docker/Podman not detected. Options: Online install, Manual install, or Binary install.
docker_not_found_desktop_hint: Docker Desktop not detected. Please install manually or use binary installation.|Download: https://www.docker.com/products/docker-desktop/
install_docker_linux_desc: Install Docker automatically using the official script
skip_docker_install_desc: Skip and use binary installation instead
docker_install_linux_prompt: You can choose to install Docker automatically or use binary installation.
install_docker_online_desc: Automatically install using get.docker.com official script
skip_docker_install_desc: Skip Docker installation and install DPanel as binary
container_install_desc: Run DPanel in a Docker/Podman container
binary_install_desc: Install DPanel as a standalone binary
binary_install_edition_warning:
Binary installation only supports Lite Edition.

Standard Edition requires Nginx and SSL certificate support, which is only available in container installation.
standard_edition_desc: Includes Nginx and SSL certificate support (requires ports 80 & 443)
lite_edition_desc: Container management only, lighter resource usage
aliyun_desc: Aliyun mirror for faster downloads in China
local_sock_desc: Connect to local Docker/Podman via Unix socket
remote_tcp_desc: Connect to remote Docker/Podman via TCP
remote_ssh_desc: Connect to remote Docker/Podman via SSH
sock_tips_1: Current Unix Sock file is located at:
sock_tips_2: You can manually execute the command below to link the Sock file to the default path
sock_tips_3: If it still doesn't work, please find the Sock file manually and specify it
sock_tips_4: If using Podman Rootless mode, create a user-level podman.sock file with
sock_tips_6: And specify the mount sock file as /run/user/%s/podman/podman.sock
container_exists: Container already exists, please choose another name
container_name_hint: Set the DPanel container name for identification and management
access_port_hint: Set the DPanel web access port, auto-detects available port by default
data_path_hint: Set the DPanel data storage directory for persistent data
proxy_address_desc: Proxy for container to access external resources (leave empty if not needed)
docker_daemon_proxy: For image pull acceleration, configure Docker daemon.json
dns_address_desc: DNS server for container (leave empty to use default)
upgrade_not_implemented:
Upgrade feature is not implemented yet.

Please use CLI mode for now.
uninstall_not_implemented:
Uninstall feature is not implemented yet.

Please use CLI mode for now.

help_input: Enter Confirm | Esc Back | Ctrl+C Quit
help_path_input: Tab Browse | Enter Confirm | Esc Back | Ctrl+C Quit
help_browse: ↑/↓ Navigate | Space Enter | Enter Confirm | Esc Cancel | Ctrl+C Quit
help_default: ↑/↓ Navigate | Enter Confirm | Esc Back | Ctrl+C Quit
title: DPanel Installer
docker_choice_linux: You can choose to install Docker automatically or use binary installation.
restart_after_docker_install: After installing Docker, please run the installer again.
enable_tls_desc: Enable TLS encryption for secure connection
disable_tls_desc: Disable TLS for plain connection (not recommended)
